headline: Bezos Backs AI Startup to Discover New Materials for Chipmaking
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Producing the world’s most in-demand semiconductors requires enormous amounts of energy and access to rare minerals. CuspAI, a two-year-old British startup, has raised nearly half a billion dollars on its bet that artificial intelligence can improve that process. headline: SK Hynix Jumps 5%, AMD Rises 4% as Korea Becomes the New Catalyst for Global Chip Stocks

headline: AMD stock climbs after Microsoft expands Azure AI partnership
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) shares gained 5% on Monday after Microsoft announced a major expansion of its strategic partnership with the chipmaker, positioning AMD’s latest AI hardware as a key component of Azure’s next-generation cloud infrastructure. At the centre of the agreement is Microsoft’s large-scale adoption of the AMD Helios Rackscale Solution, which will support frontier AI model inference across Azure cloud services and enterprise workloads.

content.title: AMD stock climbs after Microsoft expands Azure AI partnership
content.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) shares gained 5% on Monday after Microsoft announced a major expansion of its strategic partnership with the chipmaker, positioning AMD’s latest AI hardware as a key component of Azure’s next-generation cloud infrastructure. At the centre of the agreement is Microsoft’s large-scale adoption of the AMD Helios Rackscale Solution, which will support frontier AI model inference across Azure cloud services and enterprise workloads.

headline: AMD Stock Rises on Vote of Confidence From a Big AI Chip Customer
summary: Microsoft plans to use AMD’s Helios AI infrastructure platform and EPYC data-center processors to power more of its Azure cloud-computing services, the two companies said Monday.  AMD stock jumped 5.1% to $521.23 on Monday after the market open, while the  rose 0.7%.  A combination of Microsoft and AMD technology will power new tools for data processing, electronic design automation, and inference, or running AI models.
